archetype_reasoning: Agricultural and carbon credit dashboard needs to feel grounded, physical, and trustworthy. We avoid clinical 'SaaS Blue' and instead use bone-white and deep forest green to reflect sustainability, with terracotta for alerts/accents.

rules: No heavy shadows. Everything should look flat and matte. Rely on 1px solid #E5E5E0 borders.
Use CSS Grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12) to organize panels logically.
Never center-align data. Always left-align text and left or right-align numbers.
Use ample negative space within cards (p-5 or p-6).

buttons.primary: bg-[#1A3622] text-white hover:bg-[#112417] rounded-md transition-colors px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium
buttons.outline: border border-[#E5E5E0] text-[#1A3622] hover:bg-[#E8F0EA] rounded-md px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium
buttons.ghost: text-[#6B7280] hover:text-[#1A3622] hover:bg-[#F3F4F6] rounded-md px-4 py-2 text-sm

badges.certifications: bg-[#E8F0EA] text-[#1A3622] text-xs font-semibold px-2 py-1 rounded-sm border border-[#1A3622]/10

iconography.style: Clean, stroke-width 1.5. Use icons sparingly to emphasize key actions, not as decoration.

images.description: Aerial view of green agricultural field. Use as a subtle, low-opacity (5%) background in the header area or for promotional widgets if needed. Do NOT obscure text.

instructions_to_main_agent: Break down the 920-line monolith into smaller `.jsx` (or `.js`) files inside a `components/` directory. No `.tsx` files.
Ensure all interactive elements and data points have `data-testid` attributes (e.g., `data-testid="btn-add-member"`, `data-testid="kpi-active-members"`).
Use French text strictly as specified in the problem statement.
Implement the layout using a `grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-6` system for the main dashboard body.
Format financial data as XOF (FCFA) using appropriate spacing (e.g., '10 000 000 FCFA').
The USSD Simulator must be styled like an old-school mobile terminal (black background, monospace green text) embedded as a panel.
Integrate Shadcn UI components natively (Card, Badge, Button, Progress, Avatar). Ensure you remove excessive drop-shadows from Shadcn components to respect the 'Organic & Earthy' matte look.
Prohibit the use of standard blue/teal generic dashboard colors. Stick to the provided palette of deep green, bone white, and terracotta.
Header must contain the cooperative name, code, certifications (EUDR, ARS 1000), and navigation links.
